title: Running of time limitations; exception; video voyeurism
doc_html:
Art. 573.2. Running of time limitations; exception; video voyeurism

            The time limitations established by Article 572 shall not commence to run as to the crime of video voyeurism (R.S. 14:283) until the crime is discovered by the victim.

            Acts 2016, No. 352, §1.
doc_text:
Art. 573.2.  Running of time limitations; exception; video voyeurism
The time limitations established by Article 572 shall not commence to run as to the
crime of video voyeurism (R.S. 14:283) until the crime is discovered by the victim.
Acts 2016, No. 352, §1.
